/usr/bin/ar qc libedge_noise.a CMakeFiles/edge_noise.dir/src/noise/GaussianNoise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge_noise.dir/src/noise/UniformNoise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge_noise.dir/src/noise/PinkNoise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge_noise.dir/src/noise/DriftNoise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge_noise.dir/src/noise/PeriodicNoise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge_noise.dir/src/noise/ImpulseNoise.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libedge_noise.a
